query:
SELECT u.name, u.role, e.nome as equipe, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.corretorId = u.id AND l.naLixeira = 0 AND l.status NOT IN ('contrato_fechado', 'perdido')) as leads_ativos
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
WHERE u.role IN ('corretor', 'gerente', 'gestor', 'superintendente')
ORDER BY u.role, u.name
LIMIT 50;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.corretorId = u.id AND l.naLixeira = 0 AND l.status NOT IN ('contrato_fechado', 'perdido')) as leads_ativos
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
WHERE u.role IN ('corretor', 'gerente', 'gestor', 'superintendente')
ORDER BY u.role, u.name
LIMIT 50;
